title: Drug delivery device with rotational holding function
abstract: It is provided a drug delivery device (1) comprising a housing (2) having at least one radial projection (2.2) forming a multi-retention mechanism, which provides a holding function to releasably hold a component (3, 6) to the housing (2) in different rotational directions (R1, R2). It is further provided a cap (3) for a drug delivery device (1) and an accessory module (6) for a drug delivery device (1).
claims: Claims Claims 1 . A drug delivery device (1 ) comprising a housing (2) having at least one radial projection (2.2) forming a multi-retention mechanism (M), which provides a holding function to releasably hold a component (3, 6) to the housing (2) in different rotational directions (R1 , R2). 2. The drug delivery device according to claim 1 , wherein the multi-retention mechanism additionally provides another retention function for releasably coupling another component (6) to the housing (2) in one of the two rotational directions (R2). 3. The drug delivery device (1 ) according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the housing (2) is capable of holding one of the components (3) in either rotational direction (R1 , R2) and prevents fitting of the other component (6) in one of the two rotational directions (R2). 4. The drug delivery device (1 ) according to any one of claims 1 to 3, wherein the at least one radial projection (2.2) is asymmetric about its centreline (Î'). 5. The drug delivery device (1 ) according to any one of claims 1 to 4, wherein - the housing (2) comprises an elongated shape having an housing flange (2.1 ) on one end, - the at least one radial projection (2.2) is arranged on an circumference section of the housing flange (2.1 ). 6. The drug delivery device (1 ) according to claim 5, wherein - two radial projections (2.2) are arranged on opposite sides of the circumference of the housing flange (2.1 ) and - the radial projections (2.2) are orientated mirror-inverted with respect to each other. 7. The drug delivery device (1 ) according to any one of claims 1 to 6, wherein the at least one radial projection (2.2) comprises a main section (2.2.1 ) and an extended section (2.2.2), wherein - at least the main section (2.2.1 ) provides an inclined surface in the direction of a longitudinal axis (A). 8. The drug delivery device (1 ) according to claim 7, wherein the extended section (2.2.2) extends the at least one radial projection (2.2) in a circumferential direction of the housing flange (2.1 ) with respect to the main section (2.2.1 ). 9. The drug delivery device (1 ) according to claim 7 or 8, wherein - with respect to the extended section (2.2.2), the main section (2.2.1 ) has an increased length in a direction of the longitudinal axis (A). 10. A cap (3) for a drug delivery device (1 ) according to any preceding claim, the cap comprising a cap flange (3.1 ) for releasably engaging the housing flange (2.1 ), wherein - the cap flange (3.1 ) comprises at least one cap recess (3.2) and - the at least one cap recess (3.2) is configured to receive the at least one radial projection (2.2), thereby providing a cap retention function. 1 1 . The cap (3) according to claim 10, wherein the at least one cap recess (3.2) extends in both directions from its centreline at least as far as a maximum distance the at least one radial projection (2.2) extends from its centreline (A). 12. The cap (3) according to claim 1 1 , wherein the at least one cap recess (3.2) is symmetric about its centreline. 13. The cap (3) according to any one of claims 10 to 12, wherein the at least one cap recess (3.2) has dimensions for receiving the main section (2.2.1 ) and the extended section (2.2.2) of the radial projection (2.2.). 14. The cap (3) according to any one of the claims 10 to 13, wherein the at least one cap recess (3.2) comprises a stop provided for abutting against the at least one radial projection (2.2) in a circumferential direction of the cap flange (3.1 ). 15. An accessory module (6) for a drug delivery device (1 ) according to any one of claims 1 to 9, in particular an accessory electronic module (6.1 ) configured for recording information of the drug delivery device (1 ), the accessory module (6) comprising a module flange (6.1 .1 ) for releasably engaging the housing flange (2.1 ), wherein - the module flange (6.1.1 ) comprises at least one module recess (6.1 .2) and - the at least one module recess (6.1.2) is configured to receive the at least one radial projection (2.2), thereby providing a module retention function. 16. The accessory module (6) according to claim 15, wherein - at least a part of the at least one module recess (6.1 .2) has a circumferential dimension at least as wide as the radial projection (2.2), - the at least one module recess (6.1 .2) includes an extending part (6.1.2.2) substantially corresponding to the extended section (2.2.2) of the radial projection (2.2).
